hooks.command:
python -c "
import sys, json, subprocess
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
file = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if file.endswith('requirements.txt'):
    result = subprocess.run(['pip', 'install', '-r', file, '--quiet'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    if result.returncode != 0:
        print('Dependency install failed:', result.stderr, file=sys.stderr)
    else:
        print('Dependencies installed from', file)
"

python -c "
import sys, json, subprocess
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
file = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if file.endswith('.py'):
    result = subprocess.run(['python', '-m', 'black', '--quiet', file], capture_output=True)
    if result.returncode != 0:
        subprocess.run(['pip', 'install', 'black', '--quiet'])
        subprocess.run(['python', '-m', 'black', '--quiet', file])
"
